userStories.title: Update app.json for EUC extreme sports branding
userStories.description: Rebrand the app to target extreme InMotion electric unicycle riders who enjoy off-road trails and adrenaline sports.
acceptanceCriteria: Update app name to reflect EUC/extreme sports identity
Update iOS location permission descriptions to mention EUC riding
Update Android permissions description
Update expo-location plugin permission text
Keep bundle identifier as com.marceausolutions.gotracker
userStories.notes: Target audience: InMotion V13, V12, S22 riders who do trail riding, off-road, and extreme sports

userStories.title: Update App.js UI text for EUC riders
userStories.description: Update all user-facing text in the app to use EUC/extreme sports terminology.
acceptanceCriteria: Update 'Activity Complete' to use EUC terminology like 'Ride Complete'
Update tracking label from 'tracking...' to EUC-specific text
Update export button labels if needed
Update stop confirmation dialog text for riders
Keep technical stats labels (mph, pace, elevation) as they are useful for EUC
userStories.notes: EUC riders care about: top speed, distance, elevation gain for hill climbing

userStories.title: Update GPX and JSON export branding
userStories.description: Update the GPX creator attribute and JSON app field to reflect EUC branding.
acceptanceCriteria: Update GPX creator attribute to new app name
Update JSON export 'app' field to new app name
Update activity names in exports to use 'Ride' instead of 'Activity'
userStories.notes: GPX files are often imported into Strava, Relive, etc.

userStories.title: Update color scheme for extreme sports aesthetic
userStories.description: Adjust the color palette to feel more aggressive/extreme while maintaining readability.
acceptanceCriteria: Consider updating primary accent color from #10b981 (green) to something more extreme
Options: electric blue (#00d4ff), neon orange (#ff6b00), or keep green if it works
Ensure high contrast for outdoor visibility
Update elevation gain/loss colors if needed
userStories.notes: CHECKPOINT COMPLETE: User approved Electric Blue (#00d4ff) color scheme

userStories.title: Update README and APP-STORE-SUBMISSION docs
userStories.description: Update documentation to reflect EUC branding for App Store submission.
acceptanceCriteria: Update README.md with EUC-focused description
Update APP-STORE-SUBMISSION.md with EUC keywords and description
Add relevant keywords: EUC, electric unicycle, InMotion, trail riding, off-road
userStories.notes: Updated README.md and APP-STORE-SUBMISSION.md with EUC branding, keywords, and App Store description

metadata.objective: Rebrand GO Tracker to target extreme InMotion electric unicycle (EUC) riders who enjoy off-road trails, hill climbing, and adrenaline sports
